item.title: Struct in C: solved exercise with arrays of structs
item.description: Solved struct exercise in C to model student records and compute averages with struct arrays.

item.title: Classes in C with struct: solved modular design exercise
item.description: Solved exercise to simulate classes in C with struct and functions, separating header interface and source implementation.

item.title: Inheritance in C: solved exercise with composition and pointers
item.description: Solved inheritance-style exercise in C using composition and function pointers to simulate polymorphic behavior.

item.title: Files in C: solved exercise to count lines and characters
item.description: Solved files-in-C exercise using fopen and fgetc to count lines and characters with proper error handling.

item.title: fread and fwrite in C: solved binary file exercise
item.description: Solved binary file exercise in C using fwrite and fread to persist and restore integer arrays.

item.title: union in C: solved exercise to save memory
item.description: Solved union exercise in C to share memory among different types.

item.title: Bitfields in C: solved exercise for compact flags
item.description: Solved bitfields exercise in C to store flags in few bits.

item.title: fgets in C: solved exercise for safe text input
item.description: Solved fgets exercise in C for safe line input and newline trimming.

item.title: fprintf and fscanf in C: solved exercise with text file
item.description: Solved fprintf and fscanf exercise in C to persist and recover text data.

item.title: Binary files and struct in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved fwrite/fread with struct exercise in C to store binary records.

item.title: Error handling with errno in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved errno and perror exercise in C to diagnose I/O failures.
